title: Bartolomeo Shocks the Colosseum
description: Pages 1–4 focus on bartolomeo shocks the colosseum, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the Colosseum battle intensifies as Bartolomeo’s strange power and cruel reputation become impossible to ignore.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: It's the Battle of B-Block!! The 138-Man Battle Royals !!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That guy's playing dirty!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's formed a team !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It would appear as though, all of a sudden

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: There's someone in the ring planning to make this a joint effort !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But that's just a matter of tactics!! It's not against the rules!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It seems that the Mastermind hails from the prudense King- Dom

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's the strategist, Dagama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Because I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gamahaha!! The Mera-mera no mi is as good as ours! It will go to the promise kingdom !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Our King, Elizabetho the second, is a natural-born weapon of destruction!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: *The tremendous power of the punches that fly from his naturally muscles body...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: left the world speech- less when he opened a massive hole in a rival nation's for- dress!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But, but there's one drawback to balance out that power!! In order to release just one of those punches...

dialogue.text: Punch

dialogue.text: "He has to" concentrate" and warm-up, for one whole, hour......!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In battle, it's a one- time Trump card!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the "king punch" said to be capable of flattening even pirates such as the yonkou, 'should it connect!!!The outcomeof,the battle depends entirely on the punch's timing!!

dialogue.text: Your majesty!! How are prepara- tions?
